{{Quote|Green is my favorite color. I can afford to indulge all my pleasures. Aren't I lucky?|Manex|<ref name="Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind]]''</ref>}}
'''Manex''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the brother of [[Roan]] and the [[Supreme Governor]] of [[New Apsolon/Legends|New Apsolon]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Manex was a very wealthy man and didn't bother to hide his immense riches. His favorite color was [[Color/Legends|green]], so he decorated his mansion with as much green as he could afford. He was suspected of murdering the former Supreme Governor, [[Ewane]], but was found innocent later on. Manex helped [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in their mission on New Apsolon by giving them vital information and taking care of [[Tahl]] when she was rescued. He became Acting Supreme Governor of New Apsolon after his brother's death. The Jedi apprehended the culprits for Roan's death, Ewane's twin daughters [[Alani]] and [[Eritha]] as well as the [[Absolutes|Absolute]] [[Balog (Human)|Balog]]. After this Manex bid farewell to the Jedi and planned to run in the upcoming election to keep his position of Supreme Governor.
